mapper.insert: INSERT INTO insp_data_tb (insp_report_id, char_id, measured_value) VALUES (#{inspReportId}, #{charId}, #{measuredValue})

INSERT INTO insp_data_tb (insp_report_id, char_id, measured_value) VALUES
(#{item.inspReportId}, #{item.charId}, #{item.measuredValue})
mapper.select: SELECT idt.insp_data_id, idt.insp_report_id, idt.char_id, idt.measured_value, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM insp_data_tb idt LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE idt.insp_report_id = #{inspReportId} ORDER BY idt.insp_data_id

SELECT idt.insp_data_id, idt.insp_report_id, idt.char_id, idt.measured_value, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM insp_data_tb idt LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE idt.char_id = #{charId} ORDER BY idt.insp_data_id

SELECT ct.char_no as charNo, ct.axis as axis, ct.nominal as nominal, ct.u_tol as uTol, ct.l_tol as lTol, idt.measured_value as measuredValue, irt.create_dt as createDt, irt.update_dt as updateDt FROM insp_report_tb irt INNER JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON idt.insp_report_id = irt.insp_report_id INNER JOIN char_tb ct ON ct.char_id = idt.char_id WHERE irt.serial_no = #{serialNo} ORDER BY ct.char_no ASC
SELECT ct.char_id as charId, ct.char_no as charNo, ct.axis as axis, ct.nominal as nominal, ct.u_tol as uTol, ct.l_tol as lTol FROM char_tb ct WHERE ct.proj_id = #{projId} AND ct.char_id = #{charId}

SELECT idt.char_id as charId, idt.measured_value as measuredValue, irt.insp_report_id as inspReportId, irt.serial_no as serialNo, irt.insp_dt as inspDt FROM insp_report_tb irt STRAIGHT_JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON idt.insp_report_id = irt.insp_report_id WHERE irt.proj_id = #{projId} AND irt.insp_dt >= #{startDt} AND irt.insp_dt < #{endDt} AND idt.char_id = #{charId}

SELECT idt.char_id as charId, ct.char_no as charNo, ct.axis as axis, ct.nominal as nominal, ct.u_tol as uTol, ct.l_tol as lTol, idt.measured_value as measuredValue, irt.insp_report_id as inspReportId, irt.serial_no as serialNo, irt.insp_dt as inspDt FROM insp_report_tb irt STRAIGHT_JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON idt.insp_report_id = irt.insp_report_id INNER JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE irt.proj_id = #{projId} AND irt.insp_dt >= #{startDt} AND irt.insp_dt < #{endDt} AND idt.char_id = #{charId}

SELECT ct.char_id as charId, ct.char_no as charNo, ct.axis as axis, ct.nominal as nominal, ct.u_tol as uTol, ct.l_tol as lTol, MIN(idt.measured_value) as measuredMin, MAX(idt.measured_value) as measuredMax, AVG(idt.measured_value) as measuredMean, COALESCE(STDDEV_POP(idt.measured_value), 0) as measuredSigma, COUNT(idt.insp_data_id) as sampleCount FROM char_tb ct LEFT JOIN insp_data_tb idt ON ct.char_id = idt.char_id WHERE ct.proj_id = #{projId} GROUP BY ct.char_id, ct.char_no, ct.axis, ct.nominal, ct.u_tol, ct.l_tol HAVING COUNT(idt.insp_data_id) > 0 ORDER BY ct.char_id
SELECT AVG(idt.measured_value) FROM insp_data_tb idt WHERE idt.char_id = #{charId}

SELECT STDDEV_POP( CASE WHEN ct.nominal <> 0 AND ct.u_tol <> 0 AND ct.l_tol <> 0 THEN (idt.measured_value - ct.nominal) / NULLIF(ABS(ct.u_tol - ct.l_tol), 0) WHEN ct.nominal = 0 AND ct.l_tol <> 0 THEN (idt.measured_value - ct.nominal) / NULLIF(ABS(ct.u_tol - ct.l_tol), 0) WHEN ct.nominal = 0 AND ct.l_tol = 0 AND ct.u_tol > 0 THEN (idt.measured_value - ct.nominal) / NULLIF(ct.u_tol, 0) ELSE NULL END ) FROM insp_data_tb idt INNER JOIN char_tb ct ON idt.char_id = ct.char_id WHERE idt.char_id = #{charId}
mapper.update: UPDATE insp_data_tb SET insp_report_id = #{inspReportId}, char_id = #{charId}, measured_value = #{measuredValue} WHERE insp_data_id = #{inspDataId}
